calendar.matters:
Amended Petition To Terminate Trust Due To Changed Circumstances, To Resolve Disputes And Consent Of All Beneficiaries.
Off Calendar May-14-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for and with Thomas Fong (Petitioner). Andrew August for Ronald Fong. Andrew Weill for Louise Fong.

Judge Wiss disclosed that her Husband was a sub-tenant of Mr. August about 10 years ago. All Counsel stated that they did not have a problem the above. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to termination of the Trust. The Amended Petition to Terminate Trust Due to Changed Circumstances, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition To Terminate Trust Due To Changed Cirdumstances, To Resolve Disputes And On Consent Of All Beneficiaries (Probate Code Sec 15403, 15409)
Off Calendar Nov-23-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for and with Thomas Fong (Petitioner).

Mr. Koplowitz presented oral argument to support his position. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
